prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. Three sequential stages arranged horizontally from left to right, showing the lifecycle of Disposable UI — interfaces that are born, serve their purpose, and vanish. STAGE 1 'CREATION' (Blue #6C82FE dominant, left): A matte black silhouette hand presses a 'Project' button on a smartphone screen. From this action, four device icons simultaneously light up — a TV, a smartphone, and two tablets — each emitting a Blue glow and thin radiating lines. The moment of UI generation. Energy and activation. STAGE 2 'ACTIVE' (Orange #F59400 dominant, center): An isometric house cross-section (smaller than IL-02) showing four rooms. In each room, a matte black silhouette figure works alongside their glowing device. Progress bars extend from each room — some at 40%, some at 70%. Orange dominates to show active work and warmth. Data flow lines connect the devices. A central speaker icon pulses. The peak of collaborative activity. STAGE 3 'DISSOLUTION' (Pink #FC6978 dominant, right): The same four device screens are dissolving — their surfaces fragment into floating light particles (Pink and White) that drift upward and dissipate. But from each dissolving screen, thin Orange lines flow downward into a solid Home Brain icon (the 3-layer structure from IL-01, shown small). The UI vanishes; the learning persists. Below, a subtle text-style label: 'UI disappears. Learning remains.' Connecting arrows between the three stages. All forms: clean uniform-weight matte black #111111 outlines. Soft-cell shading. Expansive Light Gray #EEEEEE background with generous negative space creating airiness. Element White on key faces for luminosity.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, chess pieces, dice, coins, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D photorealism, realistic people, text-heavy infographic, realistic UI screenshots
